title: Evidence Detection Discovery
objective: Implement a read-only detector that maps workflow action logs to gate evidence without mutating the ledger.

integration_points.reason: Defines ACTION_LOG_FILE dual-write target (.automation/actions.jsonl). Detection must read this format and handle the feature flag being disabled.
Future hook location after workflow actions complete. No changes in Phase 5.1, but detection must be compatible with its output.
Expose a manual npm script (evidence:detect) so humans/agents can run the detector during validation.

constraints: Graceful handling of missing or malformed logs
risks: Malformed JSONL entries should not crash detection
ACTION_LOG_JSONL flag may be off; script must fallback to execution_trace.jsonl
validation: Manual run of npm run evidence:detect
